No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger, food security, or agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course mentions M&A in the 'biomedical industry,' which tangentially supports R&D for diseases and access to medicines (Target 3.b) through corporate consolidation.
evidence: 在政府大力推動的生醫產業，併購更是蔚為風氣

Quality Education.reason: As a graduate-level university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and advanced professional knowledge for employment (Target 4.4). It also covers social responsibility (Target 4.7).
evidence: 習得科管與智財相關進階專業知識 (Students will acquire advanced professional knowledge in Technology, Innovation and Intellectual Property Management)
Graduate Institute of Technology, Innovation and Intellectual Property Management

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to energy, renewables, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course focuses on M&A as a strategy for corporate growth, enhancing competitiveness, and achieving high added value in high-tech industries (Target 8.2).
evidence: 併購成為企業成長與發展的重要策略之一
強化企業競爭能力與掌握競爭優勢

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's central theme is the strategic acquisition and management of intellectual property in high-tech industries through M&A, directly enhancing technological capabilities and fostering innovation (Target 9.5).
evidence: 智慧財產與企業併購專題研究
快速的取得所需的資產與智慧財產（包括技術、人才、專利與 know-how）

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to reducing inequalities or promoting inclusion.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to urban development, housing, or public spaces.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: A core competency is to 'understand and identify social responsibility and sustainability issues,' tangentially relating to companies adopting sustainable practices (Target 12.6).
evidence: B. 理解與辨別社會責任與永續議題 (Students will understand and be able to identify social responsibility and sustainability issues)

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to climate change, mitigation, or adaptation.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course examines legal frameworks, due diligence, and cases like insider trading in M&A, promoting the rule of law (Target 16.3) and combating corruption (Target 16.5).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course analyzes international M&A, which involves cross-border collaboration, technology transfer, and knowledge sharing, aligning with global partnerships for development (Targets 17.6, 17.17).
